rationale: No conflict. Elec. Code §274.024 governs reporting on publication of constitutional amendment notices. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not affect or conflict with these notice-reporting procedures.
quote: Sec. 274.024. REPORT ON NOTICE PUBLICATION TO SECRETARY OF STATE.
_note: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) is substantively unrelated to the election code notice-reporting requirements in Elec. Code §274.024.
